title: QA360 – SaaS Platform
description: Developed and deployed a QA automation SaaS platform with React dashboard frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and Playwright-based automated tests for functional/E2E testing.

title: QuickBid – Auction Web Application
description: Developed and tested an online bidding application. Created test plans, scenarios, cases; executed functional/regression testing; SQL validation.

title: Hire Hub Platform
description: HireHub is a web-based platform for managing recruitment processes. It helps in job posting, applications, and candidate tracking. Designed to make hiring simple, organized, and efficient.

title: Note Bank Application
description: Built a digital note-sharing app for college students with secure login and note access. Performed functional testing and validation.

title: Placement Cell Management
description: Developed a web-based system to streamline student–recruiter interactions. Modules for registration, job postings, recruiter management.
